text:
おつかれさま！
へっぽこぴーのアンタにしては
まずまずだったんじゃない？

でも私の見てきたアークスの中じゃ
まだ下から３番目くらいかな？

私に言わせれば、アンタくらいじゃ
まだまだへっぽこぴーよ！

もっともっと頑張って
難しいクエストに挑戦しなさい

Hey, nice work!
That was, like, three-quarters of the way to
halfway decent for a clown like you.

You may have climbed up a rung on the ladder,
but you're still flailing around beneath the big
top, as far as I'm concerned.

The point I'm trying to make here is that
you still aren't good for much beyond
low-level clownery.

Work harder and take a crack at some
tougher quests!
